text:
Lubo (ルボ, Rubo), probably a country, is where the Lubo Civil War (, Rubo no Naisen) took place. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 347 

Overview

A civil war took place in Lubo and the mercenary group known as Stone Wall became famous for being the only group that was able to survive the entire war without a single casualty. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Muherr mentions the Civil War that took place in Lubo, when he divulges the backstory of Golem's mercenary group the Stone Wall to Ging. 

References
